allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TOKEN OK, user:', d['user']['name'], '/', d['user']['role']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\),'incidents:', [i['type'] for i in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('active event:', d\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/emergency/start -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"type":"פח\\"ע - ישוב","location":"יישוב חרמש","grid":"1672/1834","scene_name":"זירת חפ\\"ק ראשית","description":"תיאור בדיקה"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Emergency started:', d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id:', d['id'], 'scene_name:', d['scene_name'], 'started_at:', d['started_at']\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/feed -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"src":"מוקדן בדיקה","text":"דיווח בדיקה מהשטח","urgent":false}')
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ console.log\('feed post:', JSON.parse\(d\).success ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ console.log\('close:', JSON.parse\(d\).success ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ console.log\('active after close:', JSON.parse\(d\)\); }\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/emergency/start -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"type":"פח\\"ע ציר","location":"ציר 55","grid":"1234/5678","scene_name":"זירת בדיקה","description":"תיאור"}')
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('start:', j.success ? 'OK id='+j.id : JSON.stringify\(j\)\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ console.log\('update:', JSON.parse\(d\).success ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\); }\)")
